entry.title: SAC Cloud connector Certificates expired, and don't know the password of renew.
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

Please let me know how can I reset the password of the certificate renew account.

Regards,

Sally

entry.title: How to get sap Certification and get job in consultant.
entry.content: After 3 years worked as a sap developer, How to get Certification and get job in consultant.

entry.title: Practice Exam for SAP Enable Now - C_SEN2305 Certification
entry.content:
Hi

Are there any SAP Enable Now practice questions I can use to prepare for my SAP Certified Application Associate- SAP Enable Now Exam?

thanks

Farida Ansari

entry.title: SAP SuccessFactors Delta Certification result not sent to Acclaim
entry.content:
Hello,

I took and pass the SAP SF Employee Central Payroll 1H2023 delta certification exam but SAP didn't update my cortication with Acclaim. Does anyone know how to get SAP to do this? I've emailed training.northamerica@sap.com with evidence of my testing and results but haven't received any response from them now.

Now my certification is sitting as expired.

entry.title: Business One - Iphone
entry.content: I have a question, I recently saw that an update was made for Business One on Android, everything is fine on this side as I have successfully configured 4 devices. However, on iPhone, the version with the old icon persists, and I haven't been able to set up the application on two devices despite installing the certificate and configuring the phone correctly. When entering the user credentials, it gives me an error message: 'The certificate for this server was not issued by a trusted certification authority.'

entry.title: SAP Cloud SDK Extensibility Developer Exam Preparation
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I am currently preparing for the C_S4CDK_2023 SAP Certified Development Associate - SAP Cloud SDK Extensibility Developer Exam.

Can anyone guide me on that from where to prepare as I do not have Learning Hub access.

Thank you!

entry.title: Stay Current
entry.content:
Hi All

I have completed SAP ARIBA Contract certification last year and also completed the stay current course.

I had no learning hub subscription for the past 8 months is there a way I can re-instead my certification?

Thanks:

entry.title: OS/DB Migration certification
entry.content:
Hi,

I have contacted SAP Training in my region, and they do not know the answer to this. Does anyone know what the replacement certification/exam for OS/DB Migrations the currently expiring one is listed below:

C_TADM70_22 - SAP Certified Technology Associate - OS/DB Migration for SAP NetWeaver 7.52

Kind Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Prospect of a Sales Cloud Functional consultant
entry.content:
Hi esteemed consultants,

What's the prospect of a Sales Cloud Functional consultant in India?

Especially when he's from a Non technical background?

How to get started and if there's any freelance opportunities available to have hands on experience in (Sales) Cloud ecosystem of SAP..

 

Much appreciate your guidance in advance.

Let's keep flourishing TOGETHER.

Sourav Roy.

entry.title: Questionmark Secure for SAP Certification : "Centra" App error
entry.content: I am unable to start questionmark. Getting an Error that Centra app is running . However i could not find it Task manager /control panel or Services. Anyone faced this issue if yes if found any solution kindly update.

entry.title: How long is the certification valid for?
entry.content: Yesterday I took the C_S4CF1_2308 exam and passed it. For How long time the certification is valid? What do you do to keep it up to date?

entry.title: For How long time the certification is valid?
entry.content: Yesterday I took the C_S4CF1_2308 exam and passed it. For How long time the certification is valid? What do you do to keep it up to date?

Sincerely,

Shaden

entry.title: SAP Sales & Distribution (SD) Certification
entry.content:
I'm learning and want to work as SAP Sales & Distribution (SD) ( Functional Consultant ). Which below certification is relevant for that?

C_TS462_2022 - SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP S/4HANA Sales 2022
OR
C_S4CS_2308 - SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition - Sales
Thanks.

entry.title: MM Certification Exam
entry.content: Hello everyone,which exam I have to give to became a SAP MM consultant ?

entry.title: Certifications List
entry.content: I went to add my Community Health Worker certification to my Success Factors profile and its not an option. How can we get this added?

entry.title: certification
entry.content:
i am planning for SAP hcm certification,which one is the updated version

C_THR12_67 - SAP Certified Application Associate – Human Capital Management with SAP ERP 6.07 OR C_HCMPAY2203 - SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP HCM Payroll with ERP 6.0 EHP7

PLEASE SUGGEST

AND after passing the exam what will be the validity period when it get expired??

entry.title: Certification advice
entry.content: Hello guys! I am currently in law school and I wanted to dive into the SAP world but I am having trouble on picking a certification that would be complimented by my future law degree. I also wanted to see what i could get certified in with the hopes of finding summer work. I would appreciate any advice or suggestions. Thank you!

entry.title: Question Certified Application Associate - PP
entry.content:
Which of the following statements is true?

1. A firmed order can be scheduled/rescheduled, but a date fixed order can't be scheduled/rescheduled using scheduling heuristics.

2. Both the firmed order and the date fixed order can be scheduled/rescheduled using scheduling heuristics.

3. Neither the firmed order nor the date fixed order can be scheduled/rescheduled using scheduling heuristics.

4. A firmed order can't be scheduled/rescheduled, but a date fixed order can be scheduled/rescheduled using scheduling heuristics.

I've found on the Internet that 1. is True but cannot find the explenation even in TS421/422.

entry.title: Which certification - C_FSM_2211 or C_TS413_2021
entry.content:
Hi,

I have been working in EAM/MRS area for some time now and want to do a Certification to boost my profile. The erstwhile EAM Certification is now discontinued and based on what I have researched, I see two options

C_FSM_2211 - SAP Certified Application Associate - Field Service Management

C_TS413_2021 - SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP S/4 HANA Asset Management

Which certification will add more value? I know FSM becomes a specific use case and more focus from SAP is towards SSAM (Service and Asset Manager) as it is based on BTP, integrates out of the box with Utilities but still would like to know expert opinion on how popular FSM is really is in real world. SAP acquired Coresystems as the product was in direct competition to SAP's own Asset Manager but there seems to be no real push, will the product be shelved in near future and the efforts and money will be lost for certification which will not see 2025. I am confused. Any help is appreciated.
